specName: Script-written task_summaries + live implement percentage label

T001.did: Added _upsert_task_summary helper plus --did/--files flags so journal_task_finish writes task_summaries.<id> {status,did,files} alongside the history finish event

T002.did: Added two Python tests proving --task writes a well-formed task_summaries entry (status/did/files), keeps the single history finish, is idempotent, and preserves other tasks' summaries

T003.did: Rewrote the implement timing rule in the shared timing-partial to call write-context.py --task with --did/--files (script owns task_summaries, no hand edit, not batched); propagated the verbatim block to all 18 embedding command bodies; shape-parity green

T004.did: Restyled the implement % into a dedicated right-aligned .step-tab__percent label whose color ramps purple->warning->success via --impl-progress (live taskCompletionPercent); badge suppressed when % shows; updated StepTab tests

T005.did: Verified: npm run compile + compile-web + jest (964 pass incl. updated StepTab tests), check-shape-parity OK, my 2 new Python tests pass, and 150 task_summaries shape matches 138 exactly {status,did,files}
